description: Convert the 'simple_model_rocket.ork' design into a 3-motor cluster configuration by modifying the motor mount inner tube to a 3-motor cluster pattern. Ensure the rocket is flight-stable with the new motor configuration through simulation. Save the modified design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/cluster_conversion.ork and document the motor selection and key flight metrics (altitude, max velocity, and stability) in a report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/cluster_report.txt.
